suggestions: I'm grateful for a smooth production deployment today with zero unexpected bugs or server alerts.
I'm thankful for the quiet, peaceful moments of reflection before Fajr to center my mind before the busy day starts.
I'm grateful for a warm, perfectly frothed cup of teh tarik during my afternoon slump to help me push through the remaining sprint tasks.
I'm thankful for that satisfying 'aha!' moment when a clean solution to a complex coding problem finally clicked.
I'm grateful for the rezeki of a stable job in tech that allows me to support myself and comfortably help out my family.
I'm thankful for the cool morning rain that made my workspace feel extra cozy and peaceful today.
I'm grateful for the warmth of a home-cooked dinner waiting for me after a long day of looking at screens.
I'm thankful for a supportive senior developer who patiently reviewed my pull request and gave constructive feedback instead of judgment.
I'm grateful for the simple joy of grabbing my favorite nasi lemak from the roadside stall before the morning rush.
I'm thankful for a work environment that respects my boundaries and makes it easy to step away for my daily prayers.
I'm grateful for a smooth, delay-free LRT commute that gave me some quiet time to listen to my favorite podcast.
I'm thankful for the lighthearted banter and laughs shared with my friends over roti canai at the mamak after a long week.
I'm grateful for the patience I've managed to build when dealing with legacy code that has absolutely no documentation.
I'm thankful for the financial independence that allows me to treat my parents to a nice weekend meal with my own earnings.
I'm grateful for the feeling of closing my IDE at the end of the day, knowing I did my absolute best.
